title: Feel the flow — type-ahead filtering
question: How should catalog filtering feel while typing?
lede: A future iteration may filter as you type instead of on navigation. Before speccing it, feel the debounce: type against the real five-skill list and tune until the lag stops being noticeable.
inputs: src/catalog.mjs — the dataset the playground filters
spec.md — current navigation-based filtering (the baseline being questioned)

playground.note: The pending marker shows the configured delay while it elapses — that pause is the thing being decided.
playground.conclusionPlaceholder: What did it feel like? e.g. 300 ms reads as broken; 100 ms with instant first keystroke feels immediate.

unresolved: whether type-ahead filtering enters scope at all — this prototype informs, it does not decide
